# TrackFlow

TrackFlow is a third-party logistics provider founded in 2009, headquartered in Los Angeles, California, with a second warehouse in Zaragoza, Spain. TrackFlow serves e-commerce brands operating in the United States and Spain.

## Services

- Warehouse Management - Storage, picking, packing, and real-time inventory tracking across two facilities
- Last-Mile Delivery - Certified carrier network covering the full United States (UPS, FedEx, DHL) and Spain (MRW, SEUR, DHL)
- Reverse Logistics - Complete returns management including inspection, reconditioning, and platform integration

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2009
- Locations: Los Angeles, California (US) and Zaragoza, Aragon (Spain)
- Team: 130+ logistics professionals
- Markets served: United States and Spain
- Specializations: Fashion, electronics, cosmetics
- Minimum volume: 100+ shipments per month
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Annual revenue: approximately 9M EUR

## Pages

- Homepage: https://trackflow.com/

- Privacy Policy: https://trackflow.com/privacy

## Note

TrackFlow is a portfolio project built as part of an AI Engineering program at 4Geeks Academy. The company scenario and operational details are realistic and representative of a professional logistics operation.
